Hu Xiu ŤÉ°ŤĄ©
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Xiu (ŤÉ°ŤĄ©)was born in Inspector of Jing province. Said to be a rude person by Sima Yi. Surrendered to Guan Yu. Hu Xiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom. Hu Xiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
